name: Bambu Lab A2L 0.4 nozzle template time_lapse_gcode
time_lapse_gcode:
;======== A2L timelape gcode ==========
;===== 2026/03/06 ====
; SKIPPABLE_START
; SKIPTYPE: timelapse
{if !spiral_mode && print_sequence != "by object"}
M622.1 S1 ; for prev firware, default turned on
M1002 judge_flag timelapse_record_flag
M622 J1


  G1 Z{max_layer_z + 0.4} F1200
  G150.3 ; move to garbage can
  G1 Y{first_layer_center_no_wipe_tower[1]} F30000; move to safe pos
  M400
  M1004 S5 P1  ; external shutter
  M971 S11 C11 O0
  M400 P350
M623
; SKIPPABLE_END
M1002 judge_flag g39_detection_flag
M622 J1
  ; enable nozzle clog detect at 3rd layer
  {if layer_num == 1 || layer_num == 2}
    M400
    G390.7 M7 S1
  {endif}
  M1002 judge_flag g39_mass_exceed_flag
  M622 J1
    {if layer_num > 1 && layer_z <= 10}
      M400
      G90
      M83
      M203 X700 Y500 Z30
      M204.3 S1
      M204 X10000
      M17 X0.8 
      G1 X0 F42000
      G390.7 M3 S1
      M204.4 S1
      M17 D
      M203 X500 Y500 Z30
    {endif}
  M623
M623
; SKIPPABLE_END
{endif}
;go x0 clamppingdetection, clear_to_x0 = [clear_to_x0]
{if !spiral_mode && print_sequence == "by object" && clear_to_x0}
M1002 judge_flag g39_detection_flag
M622 J1
  ; enable nozzle clog detect at 3rd layer
   {if layer_num == 1 || layer_num == 2}
    M400
    G390.7 M7 S1
  {endif}
  M1002 judge_flag g39_mass_exceed_flag
  M622 J1
    {if layer_num > 1 && layer_z <= 10}
      M400
      G90
      M83
      M203 X700 Y500 Z30
      M204.3 S1
      M204 X10000
      M17 X0.8 
      G1 X0 F42000
      G390.7 M3 S1
      M204.4 S1
      M17 D
      M203 X500 Y500 Z30
    {endif}
  M623
M623
{endif}
